# Muhammad Saad — Security Analyst

Field notes on offensive security, malware analysis, detection engineering, and tooling.

## Key pages
- /          : Home — retro-arcade game select terminal
- /blog/     : Blog — active game library of detection writeups and security research
- /about/    : About — professional profile, links, and contact information
- /archive/  : Archive — signal archive with early legacy posts

## About
Muhammad Saad is a Security Analyst at StrikeReady, formerly Malware Analyst at DFRSC.
